title: Lead Revenue Manager at Leela Palaces

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Leela Palaces
jsonLd.description:
We at Leela Palaces are looking for an experienced Revenue Manager based out of Kanpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Leela Palaces:
Leela Palaces is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Leela Palaces!
